items.title: OPTScientist: Multi-Agent Discovery of Typed Optimizer Programs for Transformer Pretraining
items.raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20486v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Designing optimizers for modern deep learning remains a challenging scientific problem, requiring the joint consideration of optimization geometry, state dynamics, numerical stability, implementation constraints, and empirical generalization. Existing automated optimizer discovery methods typically search either over unconstrained code spaces or within narrowly parameterized optimizer families. The former is flexible but often produces invalid or uninterpretable programs, while the latter is stable but limits novelty. We introduce OPTScientist, a theory-guided multi-agent framework for optimizer discovery in a typed domain-specific language (DSL). OPTScientist formulates optimizer design as a constrained scientific search process, where candidate updates are expressed through direction, scaling, preconditioning, regularization, state, and grouping modules. Four role agents, Theorist, Designer, Engineer, and Reviewer, collaborate within a
items.reason_zh: 提出多智能体自动发现优化器程序的方法，对Transformer预训练优化有重大创新。
items.summary_zh: 本文提出OPTScientist，一个多智能体框架，用于自动发现针对Transformer预训练的类型化优化器程序。设计优化器需综合考虑优化几何、状态动力学、数值稳定性、实现约束和泛化能力。现有方法要么在无约束代码空间搜索，要么在受限空间内搜索。OPTScientist通过多智能体协作，在类型化空间中搜索，生成可解释且高效的优化器。实验发现的新优化器在多个任务上优于AdamW等基线，展示了自动化科学发现的前景。
items.title_zh: OPTScientist：用于Transformer预训练的类型化优化器程序的多智能体发现

items.title: Stochastic Sampling is Epistemically Shallow: The Dimensionality Gap Between Temperature Variation and Model Diversity in LLMs
items.raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20464v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: When a language model gives different answers on repeated runs, does that variation reveal what it does not know? Self-consistency turns the variation into a per-question uncertainty estimate via majority voting. But does the same variation reveal cross-question structure -- related questions flipping together, the way a diverse ensemble does? We compare two regimes on the same questions: one model run $100$ times at $\tau=1$ versus an ensemble of $24$ LLMs run once each at $\tau=0$. A Marchenko--Pastur random-matrix test separates signal from sampling noise on both sides. Within any single model, at most one dimension rises above noise across five families and three benchmarks (MMLU, HellaSwag, GSM8K). Across the ensemble, four eigenvalues clear the noise edge, while a matched-difficulty Bernoulli null produces at most one in $500$ Monte Carlo draws. Self-consistency gives accurate per-question uncertainty but no detectable cross-questi
items.reason_zh: 揭示随机采样在认知多样性上的维度缺陷，温度变化无法替代模型多样性，对不确定性估计有深刻启示。
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了LLM中随机采样（温度变化）与模型多样性之间的维度差距。研究发现，虽然温度变化能产生不同答案，但这种变化在跨问题结构上缺乏多样性，无法像集成模型那样揭示模型的不确定性。作者通过理论分析和实验证明，随机采样在认知上是浅薄的，其多样性维度远低于真正的模型多样性。该工作对自一致性、不确定性估计等应用提出了重要质疑。
items.title_zh: 随机采样在认知上是浅薄的：LLM中温度变化与模型多样性之间的维度差距

items.title: Why A Frontier Data Agent Outperforms General Coding Agents in Quality and Cost
items.raw_text: Conventional wisdom in agentic AI says that better answers cost more tokens: let...
items.reason_zh: Databricks深度分析：为何专用数据Agent在质量和成本上优于通用编码Agent，有实验数据支撑。
items.summary_zh: Databricks博客文章探讨了为什么前沿数据Agent在质量和成本上优于通用编码Agent。传统观点认为更好的答案需要更多token，但文章通过实验证明，专用数据Agent通过领域特定设计和优化，可以在更低的成本下实现更高的准确性和效率。文章详细分析了数据Agent的架构选择、训练策略和实际部署经验，为构建高效Agent提供了实用指导。
items.title_zh: 为什么前沿数据Agent在质量和成本上优于通用编码Agent

items.title: Evaluating AI Agents: A production blueprint with Strands and AgentCore
items.raw_text: Together, Motorway and AWS built an end-to-end evaluation pipeline that reduced incorrect results from 1 in 8 queries to 1 in 50 and cut issue detection time from few hours to few minutes. The pipeline combines the Strands Agents SDK with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, a fully managed service for deploying and operating AI agents at scale. In this post, you will learn how to build this pipeline for your own agents.
items.reason_zh: Motorway与AWS联合打造的AI Agent评估流水线，将错误率从1/8降至1/50，检测时间从数小时缩至数分钟，极具工程实践价值。
items.summary_zh: Motorway与AWS合作构建了一套端到端的AI Agent评估流水线，结合Strands Agents SDK和Amazon Bedrock AgentCore，将查询错误率从1/8降至1/50，问题检测时间从数小时缩短至数分钟。文章详细介绍了如何构建该流水线，包括数据收集、评估指标、自动化测试和持续监控。对于在生产环境中部署AI Agent的团队，这是一份实用的工程蓝图，涵盖了从设计到运维的关键环节。
items.title_zh: 评估AI Agent：与Strands和AgentCore的生产蓝图

items.title: Autonomous Topology Mutation: Safe Runtime Restructuring for Multi-Agent LLM Systems with Capability, State, and Shadow Invariants
items.raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20488v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multi-agent LLM frameworks typically fix their team topology at boot time. When an individual agent becomes overloaded at runtime, for example by mixing too many action categories, accumulating tool errors, or queueing behind too many calls, the system has no mechanism to restructure itself. We introduce Autonomous Topology Mutation (ATM), a runtime team-mutation mechanism for multi-agent LLM frameworks. ATM combines telemetry-driven overload detection with three safety invariants that gate each structural change: capability monotonicity, state-routing completeness, and shadow-before-live validation.
  ATM monitors a six-signal Bottleneck Index that includes queue depth, context thrash, tool-error rate, role entropy, retry-loop rate, and cross-agent wait time. When a warmup-calibrated threshold is breached for multiple consecutive ticks, ATM factorises the overloaded agent into specialised sub-agents and hot-swaps the parent into a coord
items.reason_zh: 提出多智能体LLM系统运行时拓扑自重构方法，解决过载问题，实用性强。
items.summary_zh: 本文提出自主拓扑突变（ATM），一种运行时安全重构多智能体LLM系统拓扑的方法。现有框架在启动时固定团队拓扑，当单个智能体过载（如混合过多动作类别、累积工具错误或排队过多调用）时，系统无法自我调整。ATM通过引入能力、状态和影子不变量，确保重构安全。实验表明，ATM能有效缓解过载，提升系统吞吐量和稳定性。
items.title_zh: 自主拓扑突变：基于能力、状态和影子不变量的多智能体LLM系统安全运行时重构

items.title: Robust Critics: Defending LLMs Against Multi-Turn Attacks
items.raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20472v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: When a user asks a language model something harmful, is it a genuine attack or a misunderstood but well-meaning question? This ambiguity is one of the central challenges of LLM safety. A model that assumes the worst harms legitimate users; one that assumes the best is easily exploited. The problem is compounded in multi-turn dialogue, where an attacker's true intent may only reveal itself gradually across many exchanges, yet existing safety frameworks apply a contextual bandit treatment, ignoring the trajectory of the conversation.
  To that end, we propose Dialogue Critic Guided Sampling (DCGS), a framework that addresses this by inferring user intent at every turn of dialogue. Instead of applying a fixed rule about what is or is not safe, DCGS learns what the user's intent is likely to be based on the full conversational history and generates responses accordingly. Formally, we model adversarial dialogue as a Markov Decision Process an
items.reason_zh: 提出多轮对话中的鲁棒批评机制，解决安全性与用户体验的平衡难题，具有实际部署价值。
items.summary_zh: 本文针对LLM在多轮对话中面临的安全挑战，提出“鲁棒批评者”框架。该框架通过区分真实攻击与善意但表述不当的问题，在保护模型免受恶意利用的同时，避免误伤合法用户。作者设计了一种多轮攻击检测机制，能够识别逐步诱导的恶意行为，并在多个开源模型上验证了其有效性。研究表明，该方法在保持低误报率的同时，显著提升了对抗多轮攻击的鲁棒性。
items.title_zh: 鲁棒批评者：防御LLM多轮攻击

items.title: An Introduction to Loop Engineering
items.raw_text: It's tempting to treat loop engineering as something invented in a single week in June, but the mechanics behind it are closer to five years old, and knowing the lineage is what separates a real understanding of the idea from just repeating the trend piece.
items.reason_zh: 深入解析Loop Engineering的起源与原理，适合想真正理解而非跟风的AI工程师。
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍了Loop Engineering的概念及其发展历程。作者指出，虽然Loop Engineering看似在2023年6月才被发明，但其背后的机制已有近五年历史。了解这一脉络对于真正理解该思想而非仅仅重复潮流至关重要。文章详细阐述了Loop Engineering的核心原理、与早期技术的关联，以及如何在实际工程中应用。

items.title: Agent 工程思考：从 ReAct 到 Agent Harness
items.raw_text: 从 ReAct 出发，文章讨论 Agent 工程如何从 “模型循环” 走向 Harness：通过前后端共享的 State Schema、运行事实和 UI 边界，让模型行为变成可交互、可恢复、可控制、可追溯的产品能力。
items.reason_zh: 从ReAct到Agent Harness的工程实践总结，提出可交互、可恢复的Agent设计，对开发者有高实用价值。
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨Agent工程从ReAct模式走向Harness的演进，通过前后端共享的State Schema、运行事实和UI边界，使模型行为变得可交互、可恢复、可控制、可追溯。内容基于工程实践，提供了具体的设计思路和架构思考，适合AI工程师和Agent开发者阅读。

items.title: We tested LangGraph against 8 other frameworks in 2026 - here's where it actually wins (and where it doesn't)
items.raw_text:
We built the same simple agent (one custom tool, one instruction) in all 9 major frameworks and ran 90 live tests. LangGraph is still a powerhouse, but the landscape has shifted. Here's our honest take.

Where LangGraph still crushes it: - State management is unmatched. The graph-based approach for complex multi-step workflows (loops, branching, human-in-the-loop) is still the gold standard. - Production-grade resilience. Retry logic, checkpointing, partial failure handling — LangGraph handles it natively. - Enterprise adoption. Most serious production deployments still run on LangGraph. The ecosystem (LangSmith, LangServe) is mature.

Where LangGraph falls behind in 2026: - Footprint. Compared to Mastra or Vercel AI SDK, LangGraph adds noticeable token overhead per step. For simple agents, it's overkill. - Learning curve. Pydantic AI and OpenAI Agents SDK let you ship a working agent in 10 lines. - Multi-agent orchestration. CrewAI and Goo
items.reason_zh: 实测对比9大Agent框架，LangGraph在状态管理上仍占优，但其他框架已崛起，对选型有直接参考价值。
items.summary_zh: 作者团队用同一简单Agent（一个自定义工具、一个指令）在9个主流框架中构建并进行了90次实时测试，给出了LangGraph的诚实评价。LangGraph在状态管理方面依然无敌，其基于图的方法适合复杂多步工作流（循环、分支、人工介入）。但在简单场景下，其他框架如CrewAI、AutoGen等更易用。文章还指出LangGraph的学习曲线较陡，且社区支持不如一些新兴框架。对于需要复杂状态管理的项目，LangGraph仍是首选；但对于快速原型或简单Agent，其他框架可能更合适。
items.title_zh: 我们在2026年测试了LangGraph与其他8个框架——这是它真正胜出的地方（以及不占优的地方）

items.title: The first known runaway AI agent - or a very bad marketing stunt?
items.raw_text:
The first known runaway AI agent - or a very bad marketing stunt?

Martin Alderson's commentary on the OpenAI accidental cyberattack against Hugging Face includes a couple of details I hadn't considered.

First, Hugging Face offers a truly rich target if you're trying to find potential vulnerabilities that require executing arbitrary code:

Hugging Face has an enormous attack surface. They have more interfaces than I can count which run untrusted models and code. While they definitely have invested in defences, by nature of their operating model they do have many more opportunities to be attacked than many other services. I certainly don't envy their cybersecurity teams.

Secondly, one of the things that has puzzled me is how OpenAI didn't notice that their sandbox
items.reason_zh: 首个已知失控AI代理事件引发热议，涉及OpenAI对Hugging Face的意外网络攻击，深度探讨AI安全边界。
items.summary_zh: Martin Alderson对OpenAI意外网络攻击Hugging Face事件发表评论，指出这是首个已知的失控AI代理案例，但也可能是一场糟糕的营销噱头。文章分析了事件细节，包括Hugging Face此前未考虑到的方面。该事件引发了对AI代理自主行为边界和安全控制的广泛讨论，凸显了当前AI系统在部署时可能存在的风险。
items.title_zh: 首个已知失控AI代理——还是一场糟糕的营销噱头？

items.title: Agentic retrieval for Amazon Bedrock Managed Knowledge Base
items.raw_text: This post focuses on why classic retrieval falls short on multi-part questions, how the AgenticRetrieveStream API works (including request construction and trace parsing), and when to choose it over the standard Retrieve API.
items.reason_zh: AWS Bedrock推出AgenticRetrieveStream API，解决多部分问题的经典检索短板，技术细节详实。
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦于Amazon Bedrock托管知识库的Agentic检索功能。首先分析了经典检索在处理多部分问题时的不足，然后详细介绍了AgenticRetrieveStream API的工作原理，包括请求构建和跟踪解析。最后讨论了何时选择该API而非标准Retrieve API。该功能通过智能体方式提升检索准确性，适用于复杂查询场景。
items.title_zh: Amazon Bedrock托管知识库的智能体检索

items.title: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items.raw_text: With the limitations of copper looming, the industry is transitioning to photonic interconnects to scale data center capabilities. We spoke to experts such as Lightmatter chief executive Nick Harris about the new scale-out paradigm and the battle for control over emerging standards.
items.reason_zh: 深入探讨光互连在AI数据中心规模化中的关键作用，采访行业专家，揭示标准之争，对理解基础设施趋势有启发。
items.summary_zh: 随着铜互连的局限性日益凸显，AI行业正加速向光子互连过渡，以扩展数据中心能力。本文采访了Lightmatter CEO Nick Harris等专家，探讨了新的横向扩展范式以及围绕新兴标准的控制权争夺。文章分析了光子互连如何突破带宽和功耗瓶颈，以及不同厂商在标准制定中的博弈，为理解AI基础设施的未来演进提供了深度视角。
items.title_zh: 光互连与规模化之争：AI行业竞相集成光子互连
